rc-dynamic-price.label: Length in millimetres
rc-dynamic-price.errorIntegerOnly: Please enter positive whole numbers only.
rc-dynamic-price.errorMaxPieceLength: Please split the length into pieces of no more than {maxPiece} mm.
rc-dynamic-price.splitHintEqual: Your length {length} mm will be split into {pieces} equal pieces of {pieceLength} mm each.
rc-dynamic-price.splitHintMaxRest: Your length {length} mm will be split into full pieces of {maxPiece} mm plus a remainder of {remainder} mm ({pieces} positions).
rc-dynamic-price.splitHintManual: The entered length {length} mm exceeds the maximum piece length of {maxPiece} mm. Please split the length yourself (e.g. {pieces} × {pieceLength} mm) and add each piece separately to the cart.
